title: Optical Coherence Elastography (OCE) — P-benchmark Skeleton
skeleton_note: Auto-generated by scripts/generate_l2_l3_skeletons.py 2026-05-01. Per-Principle hand-authoring required to: (a) curate 20 dev instances + 10 holdout instances from a real dataset, (b) populate baselines with measured PSNR / accuracy / mIoU on the dev set, (c) write the M1-M6 anti-overfitting mechanism manifests, (d) compile S1-S4 gate evidence. See PWM_PART1_C1_STATUS.md for the per-Principle authoring queue.
